subject: Update
body:
Dear Mr. Epstein,

 

Neil is traveling and requested that I provide an update on the
investigation.  

 

Phone calls for the individual of interest are unavailable because the
individual has a domestic phone plan that allows an unlimited number of
calls.  As a result, the phone provider does not list individual calls.
We are making further inquiries regarding a possible different provider
for long distant calls and will keep you informed of any developments.

 

Best regards,

 

Bill Livingstone
body_html:
Dear Mr. Epstein,

 

Neil is traveling and requested that I provide an update on the investigation. 

 

Phone calls for the individual of interest are unavailable because the individual has a domestic phone plan that allows an unlimited number of calls.  As a result, the phone provider does not list individual calls.  We are making further inquiries regarding a possible different provider for long distant calls and will keep you informed of any developments.

 

Best regards,

 

Bill Livingstone

subject: Update
body:
Marcus will have samples prices together for the curtains tom - where should he fedex to?
Also he will have all the bedroom furniture picked out too so I will be able to pay and order tom
Marcus is also dealing w/the lampshades and the few other items of furniture missing such as in the mbr corridor
Saw Martha Stewart who asked after you.
Kisses




Thx

G
